title: Generating Arkansas Jobs Act of 2025
sponsor: Sen. Jonathan Dismang (R-Searcy), Rep. Les Eaves (R-Searcy)
key_provision: Creates strategic investment rider; iterative resubmission mechanism for PSC denials; auto-approval if PSC misses deadlines; rate cap at 10% below national average
source: BillTrack50, Arkansas Legislature, Talk Business & Politics

title: Sales and Use Tax Data Center Exemption Amendment
sponsor: Rep. Aaron Pilkington (R-Knoxville), Sen. Jonathan Dismang
key_provision: Reduces data center investment threshold from $500M to $100M; creates Qualified Large Data Center ($2B across 2+ nonadjacent sites); fiber infrastructure tax-exempt; crypto mining excluded

title: Decentralized Access to Technology Alternatives Act of 2026
key_provision: Creates CREU category exempt from FERC/FPA/PURPA/PUHCA for physically islanded power systems serving data centers
